summary: Backend-only testing completed for Healthcare Booking Platform - All 16 tests passed including Razorpay MOCK payment flow. One bug fixed during testing.

fixed_issues.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error (500 Internal Server Error)
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Added review_doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one to remove MongoDB _id

critical_code_review_comments: Razorpay integration is in MOCK mode - returns mock order_ids (order_mock_*) when RAZORPAY_KEY_ID is not configured or set to placeholder
To enable real Razorpay payments, update RAZORPAY_KEY_ID and RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET in /app/backend/.env with actual credentials
seed_data_creation: Demo patient (patient@demo.com) and doctor (doctor@demo.com) users created during testing if not already present
context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay MOCK mode is working correctly. Order creation returns order_mock_* IDs, payment verification auto-passes for mock orders. All core APIs tested: auth, doctors, appointments, reviews, payments.

mocked_apis.Razorpay create-order: Returns mock order_id (order_mock_*) when RAZORPAY_KEY_ID is placeholder
mocked_apis.Razorpay verify: Auto-verifies mock orders (order_mock_*) without signature validation
